CreateBidInstance.billing.paymentTiming: Payment method: Prepaid, Postpaid, or bidding (spot instance)
CreateBidInstance.billing.reservation: Reservation info; required for Prepaid, not needed for Postpaid
CreateBidInstance.bidModel: Spot instance bid model: market (market price) or custom (user-defined)
CreateBidInstance.bidPrice: Spot instance bid price in CNY/minute; effective when bidModel=custom
CreateBidInstance.rootDiskSizeInGb: System disk size in GB; default 40, range [40, 2048]
CreateBidInstance.createCdsList: List of CDS disks to create
CreateBidInstance.createCdsList.storageType: CDS disk type: enhanced_ssd_pl0/pl1/pl2/pl3, cloud_hp1 or premium_ssd (general SSD), hp1 or ssd (high-performance), elastic_ephemeral_disk; default hp1
CreateBidInstance.createCdsList.cdsSizeInGB: CDS disk size in GB, must be a positive integer, range 0~5120
CreateBidInstance.createCdsList.name: Disk name
CreateBidInstance.createCdsList.snapshotId: Snapshot ID for creating disk from snapshot; must not be smaller than snapshot size
CreateBidInstance.createCdsList.deleteWithInstance: Delete disk with instance; effective for pay-as-you-go, default false; requires cdsAttributeActive=true on release for V2 API
CreateBidInstance.createCdsList.deleteAutoSnapshot: Whether to delete auto snapshots on release
CreateBidInstance.ephemeralDisks.storageType: CDS disk type: enhanced_ssd_pl0/pl1/pl2/pl3, cloud_hp1 or premium_ssd (general SSD), hp1 or ssd (high-performance), elastic_ephemeral_disk; default hp1
CreateBidInstance.networkCapacityInMbps: Public bandwidth in Mbps, range 0~200; 0 means no public IP
CreateBidInstance.purchaseCount: Number of instances to create in batch; default 1
CreateBidInstance.name: Instance name; used as prefix in batch creation
CreateBidInstance.autoSeqSuffix: Whether to auto-generate sequential suffixes for name and hostname
CreateBidInstance.adminPass: Instance admin password; must be encrypted in transit
CreateBidInstance.relationTag: Whether to associate tags with existing tag keys
CreateBidInstance.fileSystems: List of CFS file systems to mount
CreateBidInstance.fileSystems.protocol: CFS protocol type: nfs or smb
CreateBidInstance.isEipAutoRelatedDelete: Whether pay-as-you-go EIP is auto-released with the spot instance
